nodes.label: Tests for live-search mode — whitelist bypass, tool routing, mode registration.
Test that skip_whitelist returns uncurated results.
Default behavior: only curated domains come through.
Test that /search accepts skip_whitelist and time_range params.
Test live_news_search tool definition and routing.
live_news_search is in the tool list.
live_news_search has query and time_range params.
live_news_search routes to scraper RPM service.
Test that live_news_search is only available in live-search mode.
live_news_search tool is included for live-search mode.
live_news_search is NOT shown in ai-chat mode.
ai-chat mode still has the regular web_search tool.
live-search keeps the core research stack and adds live_news_search.
live_news_search must count as fresh-news coverage in live-search mode.
Reasoning-only loops must fall back to deterministic live tools.
Test live-search mode registration in model params.
live-search has appropriate temperature and token limits.
live-search has DeepSeek Flash context tiers.
Postgres store returns correct defaults for live-search.
Prompt instructs agent about whitelist bypass.
Test that live-search API route exists (toggle mode, no separate channel).
live-search is a toggle mode, NOT a separate channel.
Integration test for the full live-search pipeline.
All components are wired up for live-search mode.
SearchRequest model validates live-search specific params.
Scraper config has live_search in routing maps.
